ducksemantics 0.1.0

Embedding clustering specification

Source: R/classes.R
DucksemanticsEmbeddingClusterSpec.Rd

Embedding clustering specification

Usage

DucksemanticsEmbeddingClusterSpec(
  k = integer(0),
  provider = NULL,
  subject_kind = NULL,
  dimensions = NULL,
  table = NULL,
  run_id = character(0),
  seed = integer(0),
  nstart = integer(0),
  max_iter = integer(0)
)

Arguments

k

Number of clusters.

provider

Optional provider filter.

subject_kind

Optional subject-kind filter.

dimensions

Optional embedding dimension filter.

table

Optional embedding table. Defaults to semantic_embeddings.

run_id

Identifier written to cluster tables.

seed

Random seed used by stats::kmeans().

nstart

Number of starts used by stats::kmeans().

max_iter

Maximum k-means iterations.

Value

A DucksemanticsEmbeddingClusterSpec object.

Details

Clustering always materializes an ordinary finite R matrix from the DuckDB FLOAT[] rows.

On this page
